Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive.reactor

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive.reactor
Project Reactor / RxJava 3 / Reactive-Streams Publisher adapters for the juneau-rest-server ReactiveStreamsAdapter SPI.

This module is opt-in. It ships three ReactiveStreamsAdapter implementations — org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive.bridge.ReactorReactiveAdapter, org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive.bridge.RxJavaReactiveAdapter, and org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive.bridge.ReactiveStreamsPublisherAdapter — registered via a META-INF/services file so merely placing this jar (plus the desired reactive library) on the classpath enables Mono / Flux / Single / Maybe / Flowable / Observable / Publisher return types from @RestOp handlers.

Containment

The reactor-core, rxjava, and reactive-streams dependencies are declared in provided scope on this module's POM. Consumers add only the reactive library and version they actually use; adapters whose backing library is absent are skipped at ServiceLoader load time. The core juneau-rest-server jar stays dependency-free.

See Also:
  • ReactiveResponseProcessor
  • REST Server — Reactive Streams
Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive
    Reactive-Streams return-type support for @RestOp handlers (opt-in, dependency-free).
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ReactiveStreamsPublisherAdapter
    Catch-all ReactiveStreamsAdapter for any Reactive-Streams org.reactivestreams.Publisher<T> that is not already handled by a more specific adapter.
    ReactorReactiveAdapter
    ReactiveStreamsAdapter for Project Reactor return types.
    RxJavaReactiveAdapter
    ReactiveStreamsAdapter for RxJava 3 return types.
